---
title: "Hi, I'm Eunice Won"
---

::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/IMG_3858 5.jpg){fig-align="center" style="border-radius: 50%;" width="559"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 3rem;"}
I'm an Intake Specialist & Marketing / Legal Assistant specializing in Personal Injury and Lemon Law matters, client intake, legal document coordination, and client communication in both English and Korean.

I also support the firm's marketing efforts through client outreach, lead management, social media content, and brand communication.
:::
:::::

## About Me

I hold a Master of Science in Digital Marketing from Cal Poly Pomona.

## Let's Connect

You can email me at euniceewon\@gmail.com or connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eunice-won-65835632b?utm_source=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=member_ios).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
